title: help me develop master drink list of every drink for riga...

messages.content: help me develop master drink list of every drink for riga as per b054. what do i neede o complete this task, seems like they're stuck there..

Looking at B054, the drink recipe card block — they've completed 3 of 7 sub-actions, which means they've likely got the master drink list started and the core espresso recipes documented, but haven't yet produced the laminated A5 cards, posted them, or walked the team through them.

The master drink list is the foundation everything else builds on. Let me build a working draft for a typical independent café in Riga, Latvia — you can correct anything that doesn't fit.

---

# Master Drink List — Riga Café
*Draft v1 — for review and correction*

---

## ESPRESSO-BASED DRINKS

| Drink | Size | Espresso Base | Variations |
|---|---|---|---|
| Espresso | Single / Double | 1 / 2 shots | — |
| Americano | Regular / Large | 2 shots | — |
| Flat White | One size (160ml) | 2 shots | Dairy / Oat / Soy / Almond |
| Cappuccino | Regular (180ml) | 2 shots | Dairy / Oat / Soy |
| Latte | Regular / Large | 2 / 3 shots | Dairy / Oat / Soy / Almond |
| Cortado | One size (120ml) | 2 shots | Dairy / Oat |
| Macchiato | One size (60ml) | 1 shot | Dairy / Oat |
| Iced Latte | Regular / Large | 2 / 3 shots | Dairy / Oat / Soy / Almond |
| Iced Americano | Regular / Large | 2 shots | — |

---

## FLAVOURED / SYRUP DRINKS

| Drink | Base | Syrup Options |
|---|---|---|
| Vanilla Latte | Latte | Vanilla |
| Caramel Latte | Latte | Caramel |
| Hazelnut Latte | Latte | Hazelnut |
| Lavender Latte | Latte | Lavender |
| Iced Flavoured Latte | Iced Latte | All of above |

*Add or remove syrups based on what's actually stocked.*

---

## HOT CHOCOLATE & ALTERNATIVES

| Drink | Size | Base | Variations |
|---|---|---|---|
| Hot Chocolate | Regular / Large | Chocolate powder or sauce | Dairy / Oat / Soy |
| Mocha | Regular / Large | Espresso + chocolate | Dairy / Oat |
| White Hot Chocolate | Regular | White chocolate | Dairy / Oat |

---

## TEA

| Drink | Size | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| English Breakfast | Regular / Large | Bag or loose leaf |
| Earl Grey | Regular / Large | — |
| Green Tea | Regular | — |
| Peppermint | Regular | — |
| Chamomile | Regular | — |

---

## COLD / ICED DRINKS

| Drink | Size | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Iced Latte | Regular / Large | Already listed above |
| Iced Americano | Regular / Large | Already listed above |
| Cold Brew | Regular | If offered |
| Iced Matcha Latte | Regular | If offered |
| Lemonade | Regular / Large | House-made or bought-in |

---

## EXTRAS / MODIFICATIONS

| Add-On | Detail |
|---|---|
| Extra shot | +1 espresso shot |
| Decaf | Available on all espresso drinks |
| Syrup | +1 pump (specify flavour) |
| Alternative milk | Oat / Soy / Almond (specify) |
| Extra hot | Steam milk to 70°C+ |
| Iced | Convert any hot drink to iced |

---

## WHAT YOU NEED TO COMPLETE B054

Here's what's left based on the 3 remaining sub-actions:

**1. Confirm and correct this list**
The consultant or owner needs to go through this and mark what's actually on the menu — add anything missing, remove anything not served. Sizes and milk options especially need to match what's actually offered.

**2. Document recipes with precise measurements**
For each drink above: dose (grams), yield (grams or ml), brew time, milk volume (ml), milk temperature, cup size, any syrup pump counts. Not approximate — exact. This is what makes the card useful.

**3. Produce the A5 laminated cards**
One card per drink category or per drink. Photo of the finished drink if possible. Posted at the espresso station at eye level.

**4. Walk the team through them together**
Not hand them out — make each drink together, using the card. This is the training moment.

---

The single thing most likely stalling them: **they're waiting until the list is "complete" before moving to cards.** It never will be. Print a working draft, laminate it in pencil-editable sleeves, and start using it tomorrow.

What's missing from this list that you know about — or do you want me to build out the recipe card format for a specific drink next?

Glad it landed. 

Now — do you want to turn that list into actual recipe cards? I can draft the full card format for the core espresso drinks with precise measurements, ready to hand to the team. That's the piece that gets B054 across the line.
